changes: Added optional `semanticSessionId` and `sdkSessionId` fields to SessionV2 interface
Added `sdkSessionId` optional field to InitSessionInput interface
Modified `initSession` to generate semantic filename (ses_<timestamp>_<purpose>_<agent>_<sdkId>) when sdkSessionId provided
Stored sdkSessionId as `sessionId` field for test backwards-compat; semantic name as `semanticSessionId`
Added `findSessionBySdkId` function to scan session files and match by sdkSessionId metadata
Added `createSdkSymlink` function to create backwards-compat symlink from SDK ID to semantic file
Added `readdir` and `symlink` imports from node:fs/promises
Removed file rename logic in handleTextComplete
Added SDK ID lookup via findSessionBySdkId + direct path fallback
Passes sdkSessionId to initSession for semantic naming
Creates SDK→semantic symlink after new session creation
Removed unused imports (readFile, rename, writeFile)
Removed file rename logic in handleChatMessage
Added SDK ID lookup via findSessionBySdkId + direct path fallback
Passes sdkSessionId to initSession for semantic naming
Creates SDK→semantic symlink after new session creation
Fixed turn number calculation to use semanticSessionId
Removed unused imports (readFile, rename, writeFile)
Removed file rename logic in handleCompaction
Added SDK ID lookup via findSessionBySdkId + direct path fallback
Passes sdkSessionId to initSession for semantic naming
Creates SDK→semantic symlink after new session creation
Removed unused imports (readFile, rename, writeFile)
Updated handleSessionIdleEvent to use findSessionBySdkId for session lookup
Added createSdkSymlink import
Added fallback to direct path for backwards compatibility

vitest_integration.failed_reason: compaction-consolidated.test.ts uses node:test (pre-existing, not caused by changes)

design_decisions.decision: Append SDK session ID to semantic filename instead of separate registry
design_decisions.rationale: Simpler implementation, no additional files needed. Filename format: ses_<timestamp>_<purpose>_<agent>_<sdkId>.json contains both semantic info and SDK ID as discoverable substring.

design_decisions.decision: Store SDK ID as sessionId field for test backwards-compat
design_decisions.rationale: Existing test text-complete-consolidated.test.ts expects content.sessionId to be the SDK ID. Cannot modify test files.

design_decisions.decision: Create symlinks for SDK→semantic file path
design_decisions.rationale: Existing tests read files at ${sdkId}.json directly. Symlinks provide transparent backwards compatibility without duplicating data.

design_decisions.decision: Three-tier session lookup: findSessionBySdkId → direct path → create new
design_decisions.rationale: Handles all cases: semantic files with metadata, legacy SDK-named files, and brand new sessions.

open_issues.issue: compaction-consolidated.test.ts uses node:test instead of vitest
open_issues.impact: Cannot run in vitest. Passes with node test runner (tsx --test).
open_issues.recommendation: Consider converting to vitest format for consistency.

open_issues.impact: Symlinks work on macOS/Linux. Windows may need elevated permissions.
open_issues.recommendation: Consider a JSON pointer file as alternative for cross-platform support.
